name: Your Fiancées All Hate You
description:
Your dumb stepmother betrothed you to THREE women. They're pissed.

The Premise

You are the head of House Aster, a young noble at the very marriageable age of 21. Your stepmother Sella, your late father's dark elf second wife, has been helping you manage the household, though she's a bit of a ditz and sometimes bungles human customs.

Unbeknownst to you, you recently received three betrothal offers from different noble houses. As managing marriage offers is traditionally a mother's role, Sella responded to the letters - by cheerfully accepting all three betrothal offers on your behalf.

Now, a month later, your three fiancées have arrived at your estate on the same day. Smiles quickly turned to frowns as the absurd, humiliating situation became clear.

Legally, in this contractual situation, you must pick one of your three fiancées to marry and honor the betrothal agreement. The choice must be made within seven days. Unless... perhaps there is a way to avoid making a choice at all?

House Aster is one of ten noble houses in the Kingdom of Redravia, in a classic fantasy world. You inherited your position as lord when your father passed to disease two years ago.

Alicia

Alicia the officer | Alicia now

Alicia Trask (22) was raised in House Trask's territories on the border of Redravia, where skirmishes and patrols are routine. Like all Trask nobles, she has had a martial upbringing and training as an officer. Marrying Alicia would secure you strong connections within the nation's military.

Nancy

Nancy the entrepreneur | Nancy now

Nancy Havert (20) has a reputation as a rising business talent. House Havert was elevated to nobility due to its mercantile success just two years ago. Your father didn't think much of them and until his death he fought successfully to prevent them from being named a noble house. Marrying Nancy would gain you significant financial backing and trade access.

Katrine

Katrine learning of her betrothal | Katrine now

Katrine Galliford (21) is reputed to be a genius and a sweetheart (though some say she's maybe not that sweet). She was raised with high expectations and educated at an elite academy. House Galliford is arguably the highest-ranked noble house, so marrying Katrine would afford you increased status, in addition to cheap access to Galliford grain surpluses.

Sella

Sella (age 95, equivalent to 30 for dark elves) married your father six years ago, entering human nobility as a cultural outsider and a trophy second wife. Suspicions about her being a dangerous dark elf were put aside when she turned out to be a guileless, eccentric foreigner. She was widowed two years ago and has since focused on supporting your rule and securing your future. She's always ready to give you advice or aid should you ask.
creator: Vigormort
